summary: Comprehensive E2E validation of Bookvia Help Center + Legal Center redesign. Backend: 6/6 tests PASS (1 skipped admin endpoint - no TOTP env). Public ticket endpoint generates BV-YYYY-XXXX correctly, validates pydantic email, persists with source='public_form'. Frontend: /ayuda renders for guest with help-form-card+help-email-card+help-emergency-card visible, help-whatsapp-card correctly HIDDEN. FAQ filters (Todo/Clientes/Negocios), search box and accordion all work. Empty submit shows toast 'Completa todos los campos'. Valid submit creates ticket BV-2026-0012 and shows help-ticket-success block. /legal renders all 5 tabs (terms/privacy/commissions/refunds/cookies) with content switching, deep link ?doc=privacy works, print button present. All 6 redirections work: /terminos /terms /privacidad /privacy /contacto /contact. Business user: help-whatsapp-card visible, menu-help navigates to /ayuda, menu-terms navigates to /legal, notification bell visible. Regression: /api/status=200, login/auth works.

issues:
HTML nesting hydration warning:

contains which renders

— invalid nesting, causes React hydration warning in console. Fix: change wrapping

to

or render Badge as inline span. Not blocking but emits errors on every page load.

verified_features: POST /api/support/public-ticket (no auth) -> 200 with {public_ref: 'BV-2026-XXXX', status: 'open', message}. Format BV-YYYY-XXXX validated by regex.
Pydantic email validation: bad email -> 422; missing required fields -> 422.
public_ref unique across 3 rapid consecutive POSTs (count-based generator works).
DB persistence verified directly via Motor: support_tickets with source='public_form' >= 1.
Guest cards: help-form-card + help-email-card + help-emergency-card visible; help-whatsapp-card HIDDEN (correct).
FAQ tabs faq-filter-all / -client / -business reduce items count when filter active (9 -> 4 client). Search input filters to 2 items on query 'cita'. faq-item-X accordion expand/collapse works.
Form submit with empty fields -> red toast 'Completa todos los campos'. Valid submit -> green toast 'Mensaje enviado' + help-ticket-success block shows 'BV-2026-0012' + email confirmation.

GET /legal renders [data-testid=legal-page]. All 5 tabs present (legal-tab-terms, -privacy, -commissions, -refunds, -cookies) + legal-print-btn. Click each tab -> respective legal-content-X becomes visible.
Deep link /legal?doc=privacy -> legal-content-privacy visible on load.
Business login (testbiz_dashboard@test.com): help-whatsapp-card visible on /ayuda. Navbar menu-help navigates to /ayuda; menu-terms navigates to /legal. Notification bell visible (9+ badge).
action_items:
(Minor / non-blocking) Fix HTML nesting in /app/frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.jsx line 58:

wrapper contains (renders

). Either change

to

or use for Badge variant. Causes React hydration console errors on every /legal load.
critical_code_review_comments: create_public_support_ticket uses count_documents+1 of current year to generate BV-YYYY-XXXX. This is NOT race-safe under high concurrency (two simultaneous requests may receive same count). For low-traffic public form this is acceptable but consider an atomic counter via $inc on a counters collection if traffic grows.
linked_user lookup uses .lower() on email — good. reporter_role defaults to 'guest' when no match — good.
Field truncations [:120], [:200], [:5000] applied — good for storage hygiene.
Endpoint is unauthenticated and unrated — recommend adding simple rate limit (e.g., slowapi 5/min by IP) to prevent ticket spam. NOT critical for MVP.
Sentry/Resend in mock mode is fine — ticket is correctly persisted to DB regardless (verified via Motor count).
LegalPage hydration warning is the only frontend issue — see action_items.

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 executed, 1 skipped due to missing admin TOTP env)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on exercised flows (cards visibility per role, FAQ filters/search/accordion, form submit valid+invalid, legal tabs, deep link, 6/6 redirections, navbar dropdown)

test_credentials: Business: testbiz_dashboard@test.com/TestBiz123! used for business view tests. Public ticket endpoint requires no auth. Admin tests skipped — to enable run with env TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASS/TOTP.
seed_data_creation: Created 5 public tickets during test run (TEST_ prefix in name+email+subject for cleanup): BV-2026-0007 through ~0012. Last visible BV-2026-0012 (from Playwright form submission). Safe to leave or cleanup via db.support_tickets.delete_many({'user_name': {'$regex': '^TEST_'}}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests run with env loaded: `set -a && . /app/frontend/.env && . /app/backend/.env && set +a && pytest backend/tests/test_public_ticket_flow.py`. Admin endpoint test is skip-on-missing-env (TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASS/TOTP) — if you want full admin coverage, set these envs. The hydration warning at LegalPage.jsx:58 was noted but not fixed (cosmetic, did not break functionality). ipapi.co CORS errors observed are pre-existing (noted in iteration_101). Public ticket counter is count_documents-based — not race-safe under heavy concurrency but acceptable for MVP traffic.
rca_of_the_issue:
N/A — all spec scenarios behave correctly. Only one cosmetic HTML nesting warning at LegalPage.jsx:58 (Badge inside

) reported as minor design issue.
